faqs.question: How do I book a photography session with DOLL PICTURES?
faqs.answer: Share your date, shoot type, and a short note through our booking form or WhatsApp. We will confirm availability and schedule a free consultation to plan coverage, style, and timeline.

faqs.question: Which areas do you cover?
faqs.answer: We are based in Erode, Tamil Nadu, and regularly cover weddings, portraits, and commercial shoots across Tamil Nadu and nearby cities. Travel for destination celebrations can be arranged.

faqs.question: What packages are available?
faqs.answer: We offer wedding and celebration packages with cinematic photo and video coverage, albums, and curated inclusions. Compare options on our Packages page or ask during consultation for a custom fit.

faqs.question: How long until we receive our photos?
faqs.answer: Turnaround depends on the package and season. Most couples receive a curated preview first, followed by the full gallery and album within the timeline shared at booking.

faqs.question: Is the consultation free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your first consultation is free — we discuss your story, preferred look, budget, and logistics so you can book with clarity.
